style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=10;" value="<b>phase:</b> 当前阶段号，从 0 开始递增，<br>到达 Integer.MAX_VALUE 后回绕到 0" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="330" x="40" y="184" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="desc-parties" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=10;" value="<b>parties:</b> 已注册的参与者总数，通过<br>register()/bulkRegister() 增加" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="330" x="40" y="222" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="desc-unarrived" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=10;" value="<b>unarrived:</b> 尚未到达的参与者数量。<br>每次 arrive 递减 1，归零时推进 phase" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="330" x="40" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="desc-term" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=10;" value="<b>T (termination):</b> 终止标志位。设为 1 后所有<br>到达操作立即返回负数，Phaser 进入终止态" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="330" x="40" y="298" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="state-example-title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=12;" value="<b>状态转换示例</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="130" x="40" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="state-example" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=10;fontFamily=Courier New;" value="初始: parties=3, unarrived=3, phase=0<br>T1 arrive: unarrived=2<br>T2 arrive: unarrived=1<br><b>T3 arrive: unarrived=0 → phase=1, unarrived=3</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="72" width="330" x="40" y="378" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tip-left" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8EAF6;strokeColor=#5C6BC0;strokeWidth=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=10;fontColor=#283593;" value="<b>关键设计:</b> 所有状态压缩在一个<br>AtomicLong (state) 中，CAS 一次<br>即可原子更新多个字段" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="330" x="40" y="466" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bg-mid" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=12;fontColor=#E65100;" value="<b>Odd Stack</b> (phase%2=1)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=10;fontColor=#999999;fontStyle=2;" value="null" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=10;fontColor=#999999;fontStyle=2;" value="null" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="80" x="660" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="stack-desc" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8F5E9;strokeColor=#43A047;strokeWidth=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1B5E20;" value="<b>入栈:</b> 线程到达但不是最后一个，<br>CAS 将 QNode 推入栈顶，本线程 park() 阻塞<br><b>出栈:</b> 最后一个线程到达后，<br>遍历栈链表，逐一 unpark() 唤醒" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="68" width="350" x="430" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tip-mid" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF3E0;strokeColor=#E65100;strokeWidth=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=10;fontColor=#BF360C;" value="<b>为什么用两个栈？</b><br>Phase 奇偶分离可避免 ABA 问题：<br>Phase 0 的线程不会与 Phase 2 的<br>线程混入同一栈，保证唤醒正确性" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="350" x="430" y="464" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bg-right" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff9e6;strokeColor=#d6b656;strokeWidth=2;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="580" width="360" x="820" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxGeometry height="30" width="320" x="840" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="flow-start" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#BBDEFB;strokeColor=#1565C0;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="arriveAndAwaitAdvance()" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="210" x="890" y="78" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="flow-dec" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5F5F5;strokeColor=#9E9E9E;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=10;" value="CAS 递减 unarrived" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="190" x="900" y="128" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="flow-cond" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E1BEE7;strokeColor=#7B1FA2;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="unarrived &gt; 1 ?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="180" x="905" y="178" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="flow-yes" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=9;fontColor=#7B1FA2;" value="<b>是: 不是最后一个</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="110" x="1060" y="182" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="flow-push" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5F5F5;strokeColor=#9E9E9E;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=10;" value="CAS 推入 Treiber 栈" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="130" x="1050" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="flow-park" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFCDD2;strokeColor=#C62828;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=9;align=center;" value="ForkJoinPool.managedBlock()<br>或 LockSupport.park()" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="140" x="1045" y="256" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="flow-no" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=9;fontColor=#2E7D32;" value="<b>否: 最后一个到达者</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="160" x="910" y="255" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="flow-advance" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#C8E6C9;strokeColor=#388E3C;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="onAdvance(phase, parties)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="170" (unarrived 重置为 parties)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="170" x="910" y="326" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="flow-wake" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#81C784;strokeColor=#2E7D32;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;align=center;" value="遍历 Treiber 栈<br>逐一 unpark() 唤醒线程" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry style="line;strokeWidth=1;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=10;dashed=1;strokeColor=#BBBBBB;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="10" width="300" x="850" y="440" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFCCBC;strokeColor=#BF360C;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=9;align=center;" value="<b>arriveAndDeregister()</b><br>递减 unarrived + parties<br>注销后不再参与下一轮" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="54" width="140" x="965" y="482" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="alt-reg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#C8E6C9;strokeColor=#388E3C;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=9;align=center;" value="<b>register()</b><br>parties++ 且 unarrived++<br>动态增加参与者" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="110" x="840" y="546" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="alt-force" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFCDD2;strokeColor=#C62828;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=9;align=center;" value="<b>forceTermination()</b><br>强制终止，唤醒所有等待线程" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(240, 244, 255), rgb(23, 27, 36)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 328px; height: 1px; padding-top: 36px; margin-left: 32px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

div.div:
T (termination): 终止标志位。设为 1 后所有
到达操作立即返回负数，Phaser 进入终止态

div.div:
初始: parties=3, unarrived=3, phase=0
T1 arrive: unarrived=2
T2 arrive: unarrived=1
T3 arrive: unarrived=0 → phase=1, unarrived=3

即可原子更新多个字段

div.div:
入栈: 线程到达但不是最后一个，
CAS 将 QNode 推入栈顶，本线程 park() 阻塞
出栈: 最后一个线程到达后，
遍历栈链表，逐一 unpark() 唤醒

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 243, 224), rgb(36, 26, 9)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(230, 81, 0), rgb(251, 123, 53));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 348px; height: 1px; padding-top: 462px; margin-left: 423px;

div.div:
为什么用两个栈？
Phase 奇偶分离可避免 ABA 问题：
Phase 0 的线程不会与 Phase 2 的
线程混入同一栈，保证唤醒正确性

arriveAndDeregister()
递减 unarrived + parties
注销后不再参与下一轮
